MineralSite.name: NI 43-101 Technical Report (PEA) for the Foxtrot Project in North America dated 2016.pdf

document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report (PEA) for the Foxtrot Project in North America dated 2016.pdf
document.description: The report details the Preliminary Economic Assessment (PEA) for Search Minerals' Foxtrot Rare Earth Element (REE) Project located near Port Hope Simpson, Newfoundland and Labrador, Canada, including geology, mineral resource estimates, mining methods, and economic analysis.
